topics.title: Conventional (fossil fuels, nuclear) and alternative (renewable sources like solar, wind, geothermal) energy sources
Need for alternative sources: resource depletion and environmental impact
Non-conventional energy sources: solar, wind and geothermal
Classification of alternative fuels and drive trains: biofuels, hydrogen, electric, hybrid
Scenario of conventional auto fuels and oil reserves: declining availability of conventional oil reserves and its impact on fuel prices
Application in spark ignition (SI) and compression ignition (CI) engines
Alcohols for SI engines: use of methanol and ethanol as SI engine fuels
Manufacturing processes and comparison of properties with gasoline
Engine performance with alcohols: impact on engine performance and emissions
Alcohol-gasoline blends: gasohol and E85, advantages and limitations
Compressed natural gas (CNG), liquefied natural gas (LNG) and biogas: availability, properties and engine modifications
Biogas: production and application (single or dual fuel)
Vegetable oils as diesel fuels: straight vegetable oil, biodiesel properties and performance in engines

Properties of hydrogen: auto ignition temperature, boiling temperature, cetane number, flammable limits, flash point, calorific value (heating value), latent heat of vaporization, octane number, stoichiometric air-fuel ratio, pour point, cloud point, volatility, sulphur, density
Sources and production of hydrogen: electrolysis of water, thermal decomposition and biological processes
Hydrogen storage and applications: challenges and methods for storing hydrogen fuel
Applications of hydrogen and engine modifications
Hazards and safety systems: safety concerns and safety systems required
Performance and emissions: performance characteristics of hydrogen engines and emissions
Fuel cells: working principle, advantages and limitations
Methods for collecting and storing solar energy
Working principle of photovoltaic conversion and electric vehicle applications
Wind energy for electric vehicles: introduction to wind turbines and types of wind turbines
Electric vehicles: design considerations, limitations and opportunities for improvement in electric vehicle technology
Electric motors: different types
Batteries: various battery types, capacities, limitations and future possibilities
Electric vehicle layout and hybrid vehicles: advantages, limitations and types of hybrid vehicles
